abstract: Disconnects from the remote streaming endpoint, ending the streaming session.
overview:
## Discussion

When this function returns, the foveated streaming session’s [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/status-swift.property] will equal [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/Status-swift.enum/disconnected(_:)] with the reason [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/DisconnectReason/appInitiatedDisconnect].

You can reconnect by calling [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/connect(endpoint:)].

# disconnect()

**Instance Method**

Disconnects from the remote streaming endpoint, ending the streaming session.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor final func disconnect() async
```

## Discussion

When this function returns, the foveated streaming session’s [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/status-swift.property] will equal [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/Status-swift.enum/disconnected(_:)] with the reason [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/DisconnectReason/appInitiatedDisconnect].

You can reconnect by calling [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/connect(endpoint:)].
title: disconnect()
